subject: chemistry
title: 20N.1.HL.TZ0.6
question_html:
What is the correct trend going down groups 1 and 17?

A. Melting points increase

B. Boiling points decrease

C. Electronegativities increase

D. Ionization energies decrease
examiners_html: Most candidates selected ionization energy as the property that decreases down both group 1 and 17.
